title: WEC Energy Group: Well Positioned For A Recession, But The Stock Is Not Cheap
text: WEC Energy Group, Inc. is a stable utility company with a 3.66% dividend yield, making it attractive during a potential recession. The company has a large customer base and stable cash flows, providing resilience in economic downturns. WEC Energy Group plans to invest in its rate base to drive future growth, but its projected earnings growth rate is lower than historical levels.

title: Why Is WEC Energy (WEC) Down 4.8% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: WEC Energy (WEC) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: FE or WEC: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors interested in stocks from the Utility - Electric Power sector have probably already heard of FirstEnergy (FE) and WEC Energy Group (WEC). But which of these two companies is the best option for those looking for undervalued stocks?

title: 3 Dividend Stocks That Should Pay You the Rest of Your Life
text: Even though we may not realize it, Air Products & Chemicals is a vital part of our daily lives. WEC Energy Group provides utility services to millions of customers.

title: WEC Energy Group's Corporate Responsibility Report highlights sustainable progress for an enduring enterprise
text: MILWAUKEE , Aug. 9, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) today released its 2022 Corporate Responsibility Report. The report provides a comprehensive overview of the company's environmental, social and governance (ESG) performance.

title: PPL Q2 Earnings Fall Short of Estimates, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: PPL's second-quarter 2023 earnings decline year over year, while revenues increase. Total electricity sales decline during the same period.

title: What You Need to Know Ahead of PPL Q2 Earnings
text: PPL's Q2 2023 results are expected to benefit from ongoing capital investments and operation and maintenance cost savings. However, higher interest expenses might have impacted negatively.

title: WEC Energy (WEC) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Lag
text: WEC Energy's (WEC) second-quarter 2023 earnings are marginally impacted by adverse weather conditions and higher interest expenses, offset entirely by rate increases and lower fuel expenses.

title: WEC Energy Group, Inc. (WEC) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: WEC Energy Group, Inc. (NYSE:WEC ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 1, 2023 2:00 PM ET Company Participants Gale Klappa – Executive Chairman Scott Lauber – President and Chief Executive Officer Xia Liu – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Julien Dumoulin-Smith – Bank of America Shar Pourreza – Guggenheim Partners Durgesh Chopra – Evercore ISI Anthony Crowdell – Mizuho Michael Sullivan – Wolfe Research Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to WEC Energy Group's Conference Call for Second Quarter 2023 Results. This call is being recorded for rebroadcast, and all participants are in a listen-only mode at this time.

title: WEC Energy Group (WEC) Surpasses Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: WEC Energy Group (WEC) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.92 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.85 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.91 per share a year ago.

title: WEC Energy beats profit estimates on lower costs
text: WEC Energy Group beat estimates for second-quarter profit on Tuesday, as lower operating costs helped offset decline in energy demand.

title: WEC Energy Group reports second-quarter results
text: MILWAUKEE , Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- WEC Energy Group (NYSE: WEC) today reported net income of $289.7 million, or 92 cents per share, for the second quarter of 2023 — up from $287.5 million, or 91 cents per share, in last year's second quarter. For the first six months of 2023, the company recorded net income of $797.2 million, or $2.52 per share — down from $853.4 million, or $2.70 per share, in the corresponding period a year ago.
